visible_entities.desc: A large, gold-colored emblem or badge with a red star at the top and Cyrillic text inscribed on it.
A red rectangular banner overlaying the emblem.
A row of small national flags draped across the lower part of the emblem.
A faint, grey world map background.

atomic_facts.fact: The text 'THE WARSAW PACT' is displayed in large, white, bold letters on the top part of the red banner.
The text 'FORMATION OF THE WARSAW TREATY ORGANIZATION' is written in smaller white letters on a thinner red strip below the main title.
The text 'THE COLD WAR' is displayed in white letters on the bottom part of the red banner.
The Cyrillic text 'ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР' is visible on a plaque at the bottom of the gold emblem.
Several flags are visible, including those of Bulgaria, Hungary, East Germany, Romania, the Soviet Union, and Czechoslovakia.

ocr: FORMATION OF THE WARSAW TREATY ORGANIZATION
spatial: The image is a title card with a layered composition. A faint world map forms the background. In the center, a large gold emblem is partially obscured by a prominent red banner containing the main titles in English. Below the banner, a row of flags is draped over the lower portion of the emblem, which also features Cyrillic text.
